settings.intro: Dummy content for the Return & Refund Policy page. Replace this with your final refund terms when ready.
settings.card_1_text: Items can be returned within 7 to 14 days of delivery if they meet your store conditions.
settings.card_2_text: Approved refunds are processed after the return is received and inspected.
settings.card_3_text: Exchange availability depends on stock levels at the time of the request.
